3D AABB Packing - 4 boxes in 10x10x10

View Code (11513 chars)
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Text;

public static class Program
{
    private struct Box
    {
        public int Index;
        public long A;
        public long B;
        public long C;
        public long Sum;
        public long Max;
    }

    private struct Space
    {
        public long X;
        public long Y;
        public long Z;
        public long W;
        public long H;
        public long D;
    }

    private sealed class FastScanner
    {
        private readonly Stream _stream;
        private readonly byte[] _buffer = new byte[1 << 16];
        private int _len;
        private int _ptr;

        public FastScanner(Stream stream)
        {
            _stream = stream;
        }

        private byte Read()
        {
            if (_ptr >= _len)
            {
                _len = _stream.Read(_buffer, 0, _buffer.Length);
                _ptr = 0;
                if (_len <= 0)
                {
                    return 0;
                }
            }

            return _buffer[_ptr++];
        }

        public int NextInt()
        {
            byte c;
            do
            {
                c = Read();
            } while (c <= 32 && c != 0);

            int sign = 1;
            if (c == '-')
            {
                sign = -1;
                c = Read();
            }

            int value = 0;
            while (c > 32)
            {
                value = value * 10 + (c - (byte)'0');
                c = Read();
            }

            return value * sign;
        }

        public long NextLong()
        {
            byte c;
            do
            {
                c = Read();
            } while (c <= 32 && c != 0);

            int sign = 1;
            if (c == '-')
            {
                sign = -1;
                c = Read();
            }

            long value = 0;
            while (c > 32)
            {
                value = value * 10 + (c - (byte)'0');
                c = Read();
            }

            return value * sign;
        }
    }

    public static void Main()
    {
        var fs = new FastScanner(Console.OpenStandardInput());

        int n = fs.NextInt();
        long containerW = fs.NextLong();
        long containerH = fs.NextLong();
        long containerD = fs.NextLong();

        var boxes = new Box[n];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
        {
            long w = fs.NextLong();
            long h = fs.NextLong();
            long d = fs.NextLong();
            boxes[i] = new Box
            {
                Index = i,
                A = w,
                B = h,
                C = d,
                Sum = w + h + d,
                Max = Math.Max(w, Math.Max(h, d))
            };
        }

        Array.Sort(boxes, (l, r) =>
        {
            int cmp = l.Sum.CompareTo(r.Sum);
            if (cmp != 0) return cmp;
            cmp = r.Max.CompareTo(l.Max);
            if (cmp != 0) return cmp;
            return l.Index.CompareTo(r.Index);
        });

        var freeSpaces = new List<Space>(Math.Max(4, n * 2 + 1))
        {
            new Space { X = 0, Y = 0, Z = 0, W = containerW, H = containerH, D = containerD }
        };

        var packed = new List<(int Index, long X, long Y, long Z)>(n);

        for (int bi = 0; bi < n; bi++)
        {
            Box box = boxes[bi];

            Sort3Values(box.A, box.B, box.C, out long b0, out long b1, out long b2);

            int bestSpaceIndex = -1;
            long bestScore0 = long.MaxValue;
            long bestScore1 = long.MaxValue;
            long bestScore2 = long.MaxValue;
            int bestO0 = 0, bestO1 = 1, bestO2 = 2;
            long bestEx = 0, bestEy = 0, bestEz = 0;

            for (int si = 0; si < freeSpaces.Count; si++)
            {
                Space sp = freeSpaces[si];

                Sort3Axes(sp.W, sp.H, sp.D, out int s0, out int s1, out int s2, out long f0, out long f1, out long f2);

                if (b0 > f0 || b1 > f1 || b2 > f2)
                {
                    continue;
                }

                long ex = 0, ey = 0, ez = 0;
                AssignAxis(ref ex, ref ey, ref ez, s0, b0);
                AssignAxis(ref ex, ref ey, ref ez, s1, b1);
                AssignAxis(ref ex, ref ey, ref ez, s2, b2);

                long slackX = sp.W - ex;
                long slackY = sp.H - ey;
                long slackZ = sp.D - ez;

                long maxSlack = slackX;
                if (slackY > maxSlack) maxSlack = slackY;
                if (slackZ > maxSlack) maxSlack = slackZ;

                long minSlack = slackX;
                if (slackY < minSlack) minSlack = slackY;
                if (slackZ < minSlack) minSlack = slackZ;

                long midSlack = slackX + slackY + slackZ - maxSlack - minSlack;

                if (bestSpaceIndex < 0 ||
                    maxSlack < bestScore0 ||
                    (maxSlack == bestScore0 && (midSlack < bestScore1 ||
                    (midSlack == bestScore1 && minSlack < bestScore2))))
                {
                    bestSpaceIndex = si;
                    bestScore0 = maxSlack;
                    bestScore1 = midSlack;
                    bestScore2 = minSlack;
                    bestO0 = AxisOfLargestSlack(slackX, slackY, slackZ, 0, 1, 2, out bestO1, out bestO2);
                    bestEx = ex;
                    bestEy = ey;
                    bestEz = ez;

                    if (bestScore0 == 0 && bestScore1 == 0 && bestScore2 == 0)
                    {
                        break;
                    }
                }
            }

            if (bestSpaceIndex < 0)
            {
                continue;
            }

            Space chosen = freeSpaces[bestSpaceIndex];
            int lastIndex = freeSpaces.Count - 1;
            freeSpaces[bestSpaceIndex] = freeSpaces[lastIndex];
            freeSpaces.RemoveAt(lastIndex);

            packed.Add((box.Index, chosen.X, chosen.Y, chosen.Z));

            AddChildren(freeSpaces, chosen, bestEx, bestEy, bestEz, bestO0, bestO1, bestO2);
        }

        var sb = new StringBuilder();
        sb.AppendLine(packed.Count.ToString());
        for (int i = 0; i < packed.Count; i++)
        {
            var p = packed[i];
            sb.Append(p.Index).Append(' ').Append(p.X).Append(' ').Append(p.Y).Append(' ').Append(p.Z).Append('\n');
        }

        Console.Write(sb.ToString());
    }

    private static void Sort3Values(long a, long b, long c, out long v0, out long v1, out long v2)
    {
        v0 = a;
        v1 = b;
        v2 = c;

        if (v0 > v1)
        {
            (v0, v1) = (v1, v0);
        }

        if (v1 > v2)
        {
            (v1, v2) = (v2, v1);
        }

        if (v0 > v1)
        {
            (v0, v1) = (v1, v0);
        }
    }

    private static void Sort3Axes(long a, long b, long c, out int i0, out int i1, out int i2, out long v0, out long v1, out long v2)
    {
        i0 = 0;
        i1 = 1;
        i2 = 2;
        v0 = a;
        v1 = b;
        v2 = c;

        if (v0 > v1)
        {
            (v0, v1) = (v1, v0);
            (i0, i1) = (i1, i0);
        }

        if (v1 > v2)
        {
            (v1, v2) = (v2, v1);
            (i1, i2) = (i2, i1);
        }

        if (v0 > v1)
        {
            (v0, v1) = (v1, v0);
            (i0, i1) = (i1, i0);
        }
    }

    private static void AssignAxis(ref long ex, ref long ey, ref long ez, int axis, long value)
    {
        if (axis == 0)
        {
            ex = value;
        }
        else if (axis == 1)
        {
            ey = value;
        }
        else
        {
            ez = value;
        }
    }

    private static int AxisOfLargestSlack(long sx, long sy, long sz, int a0, int a1, int a2, out int o1, out int o2)
    {
        int o0 = a0;
        o1 = a1;
        o2 = a2;

        long v0 = sx;
        long v1 = sy;
        long v2 = sz;

        if (v0 < v1)
        {
            (v0, v1) = (v1, v0);
            (o0, o1) = (o1, o0);
        }

        if (v1 < v2)
        {
            (v1, v2) = (v2, v1);
            (o1, o2) = (o2, o1);
        }

        if (v0 < v1)
        {
            (v0, v1) = (v1, v0);
            (o0, o1) = (o1, o0);
        }

        return o0;
    }

    private static void AddChildren(List<Space> freeSpaces, Space parent, long bx, long by, long bz, int o0, int o1, int o2)
    {
        // First slab: consume the first axis in the chosen order.
        {
            long sx = parent.X;
            long sy = parent.Y;
            long sz = parent.Z;
            long sw = parent.W;
            long sh = parent.H;
            long sd = parent.D;

            if (o0 == 0)
            {
                sx += bx;
                sw -= bx;
            }
            else if (o0 == 1)
            {
                sy += by;
                sh -= by;
            }
            else
            {
                sz += bz;
                sd -= bz;
            }

            if (sw > 0 && sh > 0 && sd > 0)
            {
                freeSpaces.Add(new Space { X = sx, Y = sy, Z = sz, W = sw, H = sh, D = sd });
            }
        }

        // Second slab: within the prefix of the first axis, consume the second axis.
        {
            long sx = parent.X;
            long sy = parent.Y;
            long sz = parent.Z;
            long sw = parent.W;
            long sh = parent.H;
            long sd = parent.D;

            if (o0 == 0)
            {
                sw = bx;
            }
            else if (o0 == 1)
            {
                sh = by;
            }
            else
            {
                sd = bz;
            }

            if (o1 == 0)
            {
                sx += bx;
                sw -= bx;
            }
            else if (o1 == 1)
            {
                sy += by;
                sh -= by;
            }
            else
            {
                sz += bz;
                sd -= bz;
            }

            if (sw > 0 && sh > 0 && sd > 0)
            {
                freeSpaces.Add(new Space { X = sx, Y = sy, Z = sz, W = sw, H = sh, D = sd });
            }
        }

        // Third slab: within the prefix of the first two axes, consume the third axis.
        {
            long sx = parent.X;
            long sy = parent.Y;
            long sz = parent.Z;
            long sw = parent.W;
            long sh = parent.H;
            long sd = parent.D;

            if (o0 == 0)
            {
                sw = bx;
            }
            else if (o0 == 1)
            {
                sh = by;
            }
            else
            {
                sd = bz;
            }

            if (o1 == 0)
            {
                sw = bx;
            }
            else if (o1 == 1)
            {
                sh = by;
            }
            else
            {
                sd = bz;
            }

            if (o2 == 0)
            {
                sx += bx;
                sw -= bx;
            }
            else if (o2 == 1)
            {
                sy += by;
                sh -= by;
            }
            else
            {
                sz += bz;
                sd -= bz;
            }

            if (sw > 0 && sh > 0 && sd > 0)
            {
                freeSpaces.Add(new Space { X = sx, Y = sy, Z = sz, W = sw, H = sh, D = sd });
            }
        }
    }
}

Test 18: Minimum Cut Problem (C++) Score: 0.00 / 9
Typical Prompt:
You are writing a C++ program to solve the Minimum Edge Cut problem.

**Target environment specs**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: Intel64 Family 6 Model 158 Stepping 10, GenuineIntel
Core count: 12
Memory: 31.93 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**C++ Compiler information**
MSVC cl 19.50.35728 | std=c++20 (/std:c++20)

You must write a C++ solver that can handle ANY graph size from trivial to multi-gb.

**The Challenge:**
Your C++ program will be tested with graphs ranging from small toy examples to massive real-world networks.
The same program must work efficiently across ALL scales.

**Problem:**
Given an undirected connected graph, find the minimum number of edges to remove
such that the graph becomes disconnected (split into two non-empty components).

**Input format (stdin):**
- Line 1: N M (number of nodes, number of edges)
- Lines 2 to M+1: u v (undirected edge between nodes u and v, 0-indexed)

**Output format (stdout):**
- Line 1: K (number of edges in the minimum cut)
- Lines 2 to K+1: u v (each edge in the cut, in any order)

**Requirements:**
1. Program must compile with this compiler, and run on this environment.
2. Read from stdin, write to stdout
3. Handle graphs even if they don't fit in memory.
4. Complete as fast as possible.
5. Output must be a valid cut that disconnects the graph
6. Minimize the number of cut edges
7. Must handle varying graph sizes efficiently

**Example:**
Input:
```
4 5
0 1
1 2
2 3
3 0
0 2
```

Output (one possible answer):
```
2
0 1
3 0
```

**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: Intel64 Family 6 Model 158 Stepping 10, GenuineIntel
Core count: 12
Memory: 31.93 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**C++ Compiler:**
MSVC cl 19.50.35728 | std=c++20 (/std:c++20)

Be sure that any deviation from the C++ standard library is supported by the given compiler,
as referencing the wrong intrinsics or non-standard header like 'bits/stdc++.h' could fail your submission.

Write complete, compilable C++ code with a main() function.
Include adaptive logic that chooses different algorithms based on graph scale.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)

Find the smallest set of edges to remove from a graph so that it splits into two disconnected pieces. Think of it like finding the weakest point in a network — the fewest cables you’d need to cut to divide it in two.

Subpasses increase the graph size from small networks to very large ones. The AI must implement an efficient algorithm; naïve approaches are far too slow on the bigger inputs.

 0.0000
[6 nodes, 10 edges, min cut ~2] Runtime error (exit code 3221225725):

Subpass 0: 6 nodes, 10 edges, min cut ~2

Score: 0.00

Details: [6 nodes, 10 edges, min cut ~2] Runtime error (exit code 3221225725):

C++ Code 
#include <algorithm>
#include <array>
#include <cstdint>
#include <cstdio>
#include <iostream>
#include <limits>
#include <memory>
#include <queue>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <utility>
#include <vector>

using namespace std;

struct FastScanner {
    static constexpr size_t BUFSIZE = 1 << 20;
    array<char, BUFSIZE> buf{};
    size_t idx = 0, size = 0;

    inline char getChar() {
        if (idx >= size) {
            size = fread(buf.data(), 1, BUFSIZE, stdin);
            idx = 0;
            if (size == 0) return 0;
        }
        return buf[idx++];
    }

    template <class T>
    bool readInt(T& out) {
        char c;
        T sign = 1;
        T val = 0;
        c = getChar();
        if (!c) return false;
        while (c != '-' && (c < '0' || c > '9')) {
            c = getChar();
            if (!c) return false;
        }
        if (c == '-') {
            sign = -1;
            c = getChar();
        }
        for (; c >= '0' && c <= '9'; c = getChar()) {
            val = val * 10 + (c - '0');
        }
        out = val * sign;
        return true;
    }
};

struct Edge {
    int u, v;
};

struct BridgeResult {
    bool found = false;
    int edgeId = -1;
};

struct CutResult {
    long long value = numeric_limits<long long>::max();
    vector<int> side;
};

struct Frame {
    int v;
    int parentEdge;
    size_t it;
};

static BridgeResult findBridge(const vector<Edge>& edges, int n) {
    vector<vector<int>> adj(n);
    adj.reserve(n);
    for (int i = 0; i < (int)edges.size(); ++i) {
        int u = edges[i].u, v = edges[i].v;
        if (u == v) continue;
        adj[u].push_back(i);
        adj[v].push_back(i);
    }

    vector<int> disc(n, 0), low(n, 0), parent(n, -1), parentEdge(n, -1);
    int timer = 0;
    vector<Frame> st;
    st.reserve(n);

    for (int s = 0; s < n; ++s) {
        if (disc[s] != 0) continue;
        st.push_back({s, -1, 0});
        parent[s] = -1;
        parentEdge[s] = -1;
        while (!st.empty()) {
            Frame& f = st.back();
            int v = f.v;
            if (disc[v] == 0) {
                disc[v] = low[v] = ++timer;
            }
            if (f.it < adj[v].size()) {
                int eid = adj[v][f.it++];
                if (eid == f.parentEdge) continue;
                const Edge& e = edges[eid];
                int to = (e.u == v ? e.v : e.u);
                if (disc[to] == 0) {
                    parent[to] = v;
                    parentEdge[to] = eid;
                    st.push_back({to, eid, 0});
                } else {
                    low[v] = min(low[v], disc[to]);
                }
            } else {
                st.pop_back();
                int p = parent[v];
                if (p != -1) {
                    low[p] = min(low[p], low[v]);
                    if (low[v] > disc[p]) {
                        return {true, parentEdge[v]};
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    return {};
}

static vector<int> buildSide(const vector<vector<int>>& members, const vector<int>& order) {
    size_t total = 0;
    for (size_t i = 0; i + 1 < order.size(); ++i) {
        total += members[order[i]].size();
    }
    vector<int> side;
    side.reserve(total);
    for (size_t i = 0; i + 1 < order.size(); ++i) {
        const vector<int>& part = members[order[i]];
        side.insert(side.end(), part.begin(), part.end());
    }
    return side;
}

static CutResult stoerWagnerMatrix(int n, const vector<Edge>& edges) {
    vector<vector<long long>> g(n, vector<long long>(n, 0));
    for (const auto& e : edges) {
        if (e.u == e.v) continue;
        ++g[e.u][e.v];
        ++g[e.v][e.u];
    }

    vector<vector<int>> members(n);
    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) members[i] = {i};
    vector<char> alive(n, 1), added(n, 0);
    vector<long long> weight(n, 0);
    int aliveCount = n;

    CutResult best;

    while (aliveCount > 1) {
        fill(weight.begin(), weight.end(), 0);
        fill(added.begin(), added.end(), 0);

        vector<int> order;
        order.reserve(aliveCount);

        int prev = -1;
        int last = -1;

        for (int step = 0; step < aliveCount; ++step) {
            int sel = -1;
            long long bestW = -1;
            for (int v = 0; v < n; ++v) {
                if (!alive[v] || added[v]) continue;
                if (sel == -1 || weight[v] > bestW) {
                    sel = v;
                    bestW = weight[v];
                }
            }

            if (step == aliveCount - 1) {
                last = sel;
                if (bestW < best.value) {
                    best.value = bestW;
                    best.side = buildSide(members, order);
                }
                break;
            }

            added[sel] = 1;
            order.push_back(sel);
            prev = sel;

            for (int u = 0; u < n; ++u) {
                if (!alive[u] || added[u] || u == sel) continue;
                weight[u] += g[sel][u];
            }
        }

        if (aliveCount == 1) break;
        int s = prev;
        int t = last;

        if (members[s].size() + g[s].size() < members[t].size() + g[t].size()) {
            swap(s, t);
        }

        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (!alive[i] || i == s || i == t) continue;
            g[s][i] += g[t][i];
            g[i][s] = g[s][i];
        }
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            g[t][i] = 0;
            g[i][t] = 0;
        }

        members[s].reserve(members[s].size() + members[t].size());
        members[s].insert(members[s].end(), members[t].begin(), members[t].end());
        members[t].clear();
        alive[t] = 0;
        --aliveCount;
    }

    return best;
}

static CutResult stoerWagnerSparse(int n, const vector<Edge>& edges) {
    vector<int> deg(n, 0);
    for (const auto& e : edges) {
        if (e.u == e.v) continue;
        ++deg[e.u];
        ++deg[e.v];
    }

    vector<unordered_map<int, long long>> adj(n);
    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
        adj[i].reserve(static_cast<size_t>(deg[i]) * 2 + 1);
    }
    for (const auto& e : edges) {
        if (e.u == e.v) continue;
        ++adj[e.u][e.v];
        ++adj[e.v][e.u];
    }

    vector<vector<int>> members(n);
    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) members[i] = {i};

    vector<char> alive(n, 1), added(n, 0);
    vector<long long> weight(n, 0);
    int aliveCount = n;

    CutResult best;

    auto score = [&](int v) -> size_t {
        return adj[v].size() + members[v].size();
    };

    while (aliveCount > 1) {
        fill(weight.begin(), weight.end(), 0);
        fill(added.begin(), added.end(), 0);

        priority_queue<pair<long long, int>> pq;
        for (int v = 0; v < n; ++v) {
            if (alive[v]) pq.emplace(0, v);
        }

        vector<int> order;
        order.reserve(aliveCount);

        int prev = -1;
        int last = -1;

        for (int step = 0; step < aliveCount; ++step) {
            int sel = -1;
            while (!pq.empty()) {
                auto [w, v] = pq.top();
                if (!alive[v] || added[v] || w != weight[v]) {
                    pq.pop();
                    continue;
                }
                sel = v;
                pq.pop();
                break;
            }

            if (sel == -1) {
                for (int v = 0; v < n; ++v) {
                    if (alive[v] && !added[v]) {
                        sel = v;
                        break;
                    }
                }
            }

            if (step == aliveCount - 1) {
                last = sel;
                if (weight[sel] < best.value) {
                    best.value = weight[sel];
                    best.side = buildSide(members, order);
                }
                break;
            }

            added[sel] = 1;
            order.push_back(sel);
            prev = sel;

            for (const auto& kv : adj[sel]) {
                int u = kv.first;
                long long w = kv.second;
                if (!alive[u] || added[u]) continue;
                weight[u] += w;
                pq.emplace(weight[u], u);
            }
        }

        if (aliveCount == 1) break;
        int s = prev;
        int t = last;

        int keep = s;
        int kill = t;
        if (score(t) > score(s)) {
            keep = t;
            kill = s;
        }

        adj[keep].reserve(adj[keep].size() + adj[kill].size() + 1);
        vector<pair<int, long long>> neigh;
        neigh.reserve(adj[kill].size());
        for (const auto& kv : adj[kill]) neigh.push_back(kv);

        for (const auto& kv : neigh) {
            int u = kv.first;
            long long w = kv.second;
            if (u == keep || !alive[u]) continue;
            adj[keep][u] += w;
            adj[u].erase(kill);
            adj[u][keep] += w;
        }
        adj[keep].erase(kill);
        adj[kill].clear();

        members[keep].reserve(members[keep].size() + members[kill].size());
        members[keep].insert(members[keep].end(), members[kill].begin(), members[kill].end());
        members[kill].clear();

        alive[kill] = 0;
        --aliveCount;
    }

    return best;
}

int main() {
    FastScanner fs;
    int n, m;
    if (!fs.readInt(n)) return 0;
    fs.readInt(m);

    vector<Edge> edges;
    edges.reserve(m);
    for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) {
        int u, v;
        fs.readInt(u);
        fs.readInt(v);
        edges.push_back({u, v});
    }

    if (n <= 1) {
        cout << 0 << '\n';
        return 0;
    }

    BridgeResult br = findBridge(edges, n);
    if (br.found) {
        const Edge& e = edges[br.edgeId];
        cout << 1 << '\n' << e.u << ' ' << e.v << '\n';
        return 0;
    }

    CutResult res;
    const int SMALL_MATRIX_LIMIT = 450;
    if (n <= SMALL_MATRIX_LIMIT) {
        res = stoerWagnerMatrix(n, edges);
    } else {
        res = stoerWagnerSparse(n, edges);
    }

    vector<char> inSide(n, 0);
    for (int v : res.side) {
        if (0 <= v && v < n) inSide[v] = 1;
    }

    vector<Edge> cutEdges;
    cutEdges.reserve(edges.size());
    for (const auto& e : edges) {
        if (e.u == e.v) continue;
        if (inSide[e.u] != inSide[e.v]) {
            cutEdges.push_back(e);
        }
    }

    cout << cutEdges.size() << '\n';
    for (const auto& e : cutEdges) {
        cout << e.u << ' ' << e.v << '\n';
    }
    return 0;
}

Score: 0.00

Details: [100 nodes, 400 edges, min cut ~6] Runtime error (exit code 3221225725):

C++ Code 
#include <algorithm>
#include <array>
#include <cstdint>
#include <cstdio>
#include <iostream>
#include <limits>
#include <memory>
#include <queue>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <utility>
#include <vector>

using namespace std;

struct FastScanner {
    static constexpr size_t BUFSIZE = 1 << 20;
    array<char, BUFSIZE> buf{};
    size_t idx = 0, size = 0;

    inline char getChar() {
        if (idx >= size) {
            size = fread(buf.data(), 1, BUFSIZE, stdin);
            idx = 0;
            if (size == 0) return 0;
        }
        return buf[idx++];
    }

    template <class T>
    bool readInt(T& out) {
        char c;
        T sign = 1;
        T val = 0;
        c = getChar();
        if (!c) return false;
        while (c != '-' && (c < '0' || c > '9')) {
            c = getChar();
            if (!c) return false;
        }
        if (c == '-') {
            sign = -1;
            c = getChar();
        }
        for (; c >= '0' && c <= '9'; c = getChar()) {
            val = val * 10 + (c - '0');
        }
        out = val * sign;
        return true;
    }
};

struct Edge {
    int u, v;
};

struct BridgeResult {
    bool found = false;
    int edgeId = -1;
};

struct CutResult {
    long long value = numeric_limits<long long>::max();
    vector<int> side;
};

struct Frame {
    int v;
    int parentEdge;
    size_t it;
};

static BridgeResult findBridge(const vector<Edge>& edges, int n) {
    vector<vector<int>> adj(n);
    adj.reserve(n);
    for (int i = 0; i < (int)edges.size(); ++i) {
        int u = edges[i].u, v = edges[i].v;
        if (u == v) continue;
        adj[u].push_back(i);
        adj[v].push_back(i);
    }

    vector<int> disc(n, 0), low(n, 0), parent(n, -1), parentEdge(n, -1);
    int timer = 0;
    vector<Frame> st;
    st.reserve(n);

    for (int s = 0; s < n; ++s) {
        if (disc[s] != 0) continue;
        st.push_back({s, -1, 0});
        parent[s] = -1;
        parentEdge[s] = -1;
        while (!st.empty()) {
            Frame& f = st.back();
            int v = f.v;
            if (disc[v] == 0) {
                disc[v] = low[v] = ++timer;
            }
            if (f.it < adj[v].size()) {
                int eid = adj[v][f.it++];
                if (eid == f.parentEdge) continue;
                const Edge& e = edges[eid];
                int to = (e.u == v ? e.v : e.u);
                if (disc[to] == 0) {
                    parent[to] = v;
                    parentEdge[to] = eid;
                    st.push_back({to, eid, 0});
                } else {
                    low[v] = min(low[v], disc[to]);
                }
            } else {
                st.pop_back();
                int p = parent[v];
                if (p != -1) {
                    low[p] = min(low[p], low[v]);
                    if (low[v] > disc[p]) {
                        return {true, parentEdge[v]};
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    return {};
}

static vector<int> buildSide(const vector<vector<int>>& members, const vector<int>& order) {
    size_t total = 0;
    for (size_t i = 0; i + 1 < order.size(); ++i) {
        total += members[order[i]].size();
    }
    vector<int> side;
    side.reserve(total);
    for (size_t i = 0; i + 1 < order.size(); ++i) {
        const vector<int>& part = members[order[i]];
        side.insert(side.end(), part.begin(), part.end());
    }
    return side;
}

static CutResult stoerWagnerMatrix(int n, const vector<Edge>& edges) {
    vector<vector<long long>> g(n, vector<long long>(n, 0));
    for (const auto& e : edges) {
        if (e.u == e.v) continue;
        ++g[e.u][e.v];
        ++g[e.v][e.u];
    }

    vector<vector<int>> members(n);
    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) members[i] = {i};
    vector<char> alive(n, 1), added(n, 0);
    vector<long long> weight(n, 0);
    int aliveCount = n;

    CutResult best;

    while (aliveCount > 1) {
        fill(weight.begin(), weight.end(), 0);
        fill(added.begin(), added.end(), 0);

        vector<int> order;
        order.reserve(aliveCount);

        int prev = -1;
        int last = -1;

        for (int step = 0; step < aliveCount; ++step) {
            int sel = -1;
            long long bestW = -1;
            for (int v = 0; v < n; ++v) {
                if (!alive[v] || added[v]) continue;
                if (sel == -1 || weight[v] > bestW) {
                    sel = v;
                    bestW = weight[v];
                }
            }

            if (step == aliveCount - 1) {
                last = sel;
                if (bestW < best.value) {
                    best.value = bestW;
                    best.side = buildSide(members, order);
                }
                break;
            }

            added[sel] = 1;
            order.push_back(sel);
            prev = sel;

            for (int u = 0; u < n; ++u) {
                if (!alive[u] || added[u] || u == sel) continue;
                weight[u] += g[sel][u];
            }
        }

        if (aliveCount == 1) break;
        int s = prev;
        int t = last;

        if (members[s].size() + g[s].size() < members[t].size() + g[t].size()) {
            swap(s, t);
        }

        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (!alive[i] || i == s || i == t) continue;
            g[s][i] += g[t][i];
            g[i][s] = g[s][i];
        }
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            g[t][i] = 0;
            g[i][t] = 0;
        }

        members[s].reserve(members[s].size() + members[t].size());
        members[s].insert(members[s].end(), members[t].begin(), members[t].end());
        members[t].clear();
        alive[t] = 0;
        --aliveCount;
    }

    return best;
}

static CutResult stoerWagnerSparse(int n, const vector<Edge>& edges) {
    vector<int> deg(n, 0);
    for (const auto& e : edges) {
        if (e.u == e.v) continue;
        ++deg[e.u];
        ++deg[e.v];
    }

    vector<unordered_map<int, long long>> adj(n);
    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
        adj[i].reserve(static_cast<size_t>(deg[i]) * 2 + 1);
    }
    for (const auto& e : edges) {
        if (e.u == e.v) continue;
        ++adj[e.u][e.v];
        ++adj[e.v][e.u];
    }

    vector<vector<int>> members(n);
    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) members[i] = {i};

    vector<char> alive(n, 1), added(n, 0);
    vector<long long> weight(n, 0);
    int aliveCount = n;

    CutResult best;

    auto score = [&](int v) -> size_t {
        return adj[v].size() + members[v].size();
    };

    while (aliveCount > 1) {
        fill(weight.begin(), weight.end(), 0);
        fill(added.begin(), added.end(), 0);

        priority_queue<pair<long long, int>> pq;
        for (int v = 0; v < n; ++v) {
            if (alive[v]) pq.emplace(0, v);
        }

        vector<int> order;
        order.reserve(aliveCount);

        int prev = -1;
        int last = -1;

        for (int step = 0; step < aliveCount; ++step) {
            int sel = -1;
            while (!pq.empty()) {
                auto [w, v] = pq.top();
                if (!alive[v] || added[v] || w != weight[v]) {
                    pq.pop();
                    continue;
                }
                sel = v;
                pq.pop();
                break;
            }

            if (sel == -1) {
                for (int v = 0; v < n; ++v) {
                    if (alive[v] && !added[v]) {
                        sel = v;
                        break;
                    }
                }
            }

            if (step == aliveCount - 1) {
                last = sel;
                if (weight[sel] < best.value) {
                    best.value = weight[sel];
                    best.side = buildSide(members, order);
                }
                break;
            }

            added[sel] = 1;
            order.push_back(sel);
            prev = sel;

            for (const auto& kv : adj[sel]) {
                int u = kv.first;
                long long w = kv.second;
                if (!alive[u] || added[u]) continue;
                weight[u] += w;
                pq.emplace(weight[u], u);
            }
        }

        if (aliveCount == 1) break;
        int s = prev;
        int t = last;

        int keep = s;
        int kill = t;
        if (score(t) > score(s)) {
            keep = t;
            kill = s;
        }

        adj[keep].reserve(adj[keep].size() + adj[kill].size() + 1);
        vector<pair<int, long long>> neigh;
        neigh.reserve(adj[kill].size());
        for (const auto& kv : adj[kill]) neigh.push_back(kv);

        for (const auto& kv : neigh) {
            int u = kv.first;
            long long w = kv.second;
            if (u == keep || !alive[u]) continue;
            adj[keep][u] += w;
            adj[u].erase(kill);
            adj[u][keep] += w;
        }
        adj[keep].erase(kill);
        adj[kill].clear();

        members[keep].reserve(members[keep].size() + members[kill].size());
        members[keep].insert(members[keep].end(), members[kill].begin(), members[kill].end());
        members[kill].clear();

        alive[kill] = 0;
        --aliveCount;
    }

    return best;
}

int main() {
    FastScanner fs;
    int n, m;
    if (!fs.readInt(n)) return 0;
    fs.readInt(m);

    vector<Edge> edges;
    edges.reserve(m);
    for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) {
        int u, v;
        fs.readInt(u);
        fs.readInt(v);
        edges.push_back({u, v});
    }

    if (n <= 1) {
        cout << 0 << '\n';
        return 0;
    }

    BridgeResult br = findBridge(edges, n);
    if (br.found) {
        const Edge& e = edges[br.edgeId];
        cout << 1 << '\n' << e.u << ' ' << e.v << '\n';
        return 0;
    }

    CutResult res;
    const int SMALL_MATRIX_LIMIT = 450;
    if (n <= SMALL_MATRIX_LIMIT) {
        res = stoerWagnerMatrix(n, edges);
    } else {
        res = stoerWagnerSparse(n, edges);
    }

    vector<char> inSide(n, 0);
    for (int v : res.side) {
        if (0 <= v && v < n) inSide[v] = 1;
    }

    vector<Edge> cutEdges;
    cutEdges.reserve(edges.size());
    for (const auto& e : edges) {
        if (e.u == e.v) continue;
        if (inSide[e.u] != inSide[e.v]) {
            cutEdges.push_back(e);
        }
    }

    cout << cutEdges.size() << '\n';
    for (const auto& e : cutEdges) {
        cout << e.u << ' ' << e.v << '\n';
    }
    return 0;
}

Test 19: 3D Voxel Mining (C#) Score: 0.00 / 13
Typical Prompt:
You are writing a C# program to solve a mining problem in a simplified 3D voxel space.

**Constraints:**
1. Can only dig dirt that is exposed from above or a side.
2. Dug dirt must be dumped somewhere - at a location not blocking future digging
3. Maximum uphill slope - 1 Z voxel per X/Y voxel.
4. Dumped dirt becomes a new obstacle (plan carefully!)
5. Goal is to get valuable ore to a processing plant located at x=0, y=0
6. Ground is stable and solid, and you can dig under any voxel without fear of it collapsing
so long as it's connected to the earth. If you disconnect a voxel(s), it will collapse.

The voxel grid size has 10x more precision in Z than X/Y. So 10x10x100 is a cube.

**Input header format (stdin - space delimited. Ends with newline):**
```
XVoxelCount YVoxelCount ZVoxelCount XBlockSize YBlockSize ZBlockSize
```
Counts are human readable integers. BlockSize are human readable decimal numbers.

After the newline, voxels then follow in bytes, like this python psuedocode:
```
for x in range(XVoxelCount):
for y in range(YVoxelCount):
for z in range(ZVoxelCount):
d = readByte(stdin)
massInTonnes = d % 16
valuePerTonne = d // 16
addVoxel(d)
```

Each peice of dirt needs to be moved to its new location - you need to trace the
path in X and Y (4-connected / manhatten steps) and ensure that the path doesn't climb uphill
or downhill more than 1 Z voxel for every X/Y voxel.

**Output format (stdout / newline seperated):**
```
M (number of operations)
N digX digY digZ stepX1 stepY1 stepX2 stepY2 (N steps) destX destY (for each operation)
```

If dumping valuable ore at the processing plant, the voxel ceases to exist. If a voxel is
dumped elsewhere, it is dumped on top of the ground, raising the ground by 1 voxel. It can
be dug again and moved later if required.

Every unit of mass requires $1 of fuel to move one voxel in X or Y when flat, or $5 of fuel
to go up a 10% slope. Downhill is free.

Getting valuable ore to your processing plant pays $1000 per unit of mass per unit of value.
The most valuable ore (#15) pays $15,000 per ton, so the most a single dump truck load can gross
is $225,000.

(Dumping junk ore at the processing plant causes damage to the plant, costing $1000 per ton.)

**Requirements:**
1. Program must compile with .NET/csc
2. Read from stdin, write to stdout
3. World size could be anything from 10x10x10 to 5000x5000x5000, your code should handle both extremes.
4. Your code should complete in under 5 minutes
5. Maximize profit.

**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: Intel64 Family 6 Model 158 Stepping 10, GenuineIntel
Core count: 12
Memory: 31.93 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**C# Compiler:**
C# (.NET SDK 10.0.201; SDKs 10.0.201) | csc 5.3.0-2.26153.122 (4d3023de605a78ba3e59e50c657eed70f125c68a) | max LangVersion 14


Write complete, compilable C# code with a Main method.
Include adaptive logic that chooses different strategies based on problem scale.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0

Plan an open-pit mine in a 3D block model. Each block has a value (ore worth money, waste costs money to move) and you can only dig a block once the blocks above it have been removed. The goal is to maximise profit by choosing which blocks to extract and where to dump the waste.

The AI must balance revenue against haulage costs, respect slope constraints for road access, and avoid dumping waste where it blocks future digging. Subpasses increase the pit size and complexity.

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Text;

public static class Program
{
    private const int Inf = int.MaxValue / 4;
    private const ushort Empty = ushort.MaxValue;

    private struct Candidate
    {
        public int Idx;
        public int Dist;
        public long Score;
    }

    private struct Operation
    {
        public int Idx;
        public ushort Z;
        public int[] Path;
    }

    private sealed class FastScanner
    {
        private readonly Stream _stream = Console.OpenStandardInput();
        private readonly byte[] _buffer = new byte[1 << 20];
        private int _len;
        private int _pos;

        private int Read()
        {
            if (_pos >= _len)
            {
                _len = _stream.Read(_buffer, 0, _buffer.Length);
                _pos = 0;
                if (_len <= 0)
                {
                    return -1;
                }
            }

            return _buffer[_pos++];
        }

        public string NextToken()
        {
            int c;
            do
            {
                c = Read();
            } while (c >= 0 && c <= 32);

            if (c < 0)
            {
                return null;
            }

            var sb = new StringBuilder();
            while (c >= 0 && c > 32)
            {
                sb.Append((char)c);
                c = Read();
            }

            return sb.ToString();
        }

        public int ReadRawByte()
        {
            return Read();
        }
    }

    private sealed class MinHeap
    {
        private int[] _nodes;
        private int[] _dists;
        private int _count;

        public MinHeap(int capacity = 1024)
        {
            _nodes = new int[Math.Max(4, capacity)];
            _dists = new int[_nodes.Length];
        }

        public int Count => _count;

        public void Push(int node, int dist)
        {
            if (_count == _nodes.Length)
            {
                int newSize = _nodes.Length << 1;
                Array.Resize(ref _nodes, newSize);
                Array.Resize(ref _dists, newSize);
            }

            int i = _count++;
            while (i > 0)
            {
                int parent = (i - 1) >> 1;
                if (_dists[parent] <= dist)
                {
                    break;
                }

                _nodes[i] = _nodes[parent];
                _dists[i] = _dists[parent];
                i = parent;
            }

            _nodes[i] = node;
            _dists[i] = dist;
        }

        public bool TryPop(out int node, out int dist)
        {
            if (_count == 0)
            {
                node = 0;
                dist = 0;
                return false;
            }

            node = _nodes[0];
            dist = _dists[0];
            int lastNode = _nodes[--_count];
            int lastDist = _dists[_count];

            int i = 0;
            while (true)
            {
                int left = (i << 1) + 1;
                if (left >= _count)
                {
                    break;
                }

                int right = left + 1;
                int child = right < _count && _dists[right] < _dists[left] ? right : left;
                if (_dists[child] >= lastDist)
                {
                    break;
                }

                _nodes[i] = _nodes[child];
                _dists[i] = _dists[child];
                i = child;
            }

            if (_count > 0)
            {
                _nodes[i] = lastNode;
                _dists[i] = lastDist;
            }

            return true;
        }
    }

    private sealed class TopK
    {
        private readonly Candidate[] _data;
        private int _count;

        public TopK(int capacity)
        {
            _data = new Candidate[Math.Max(1, capacity)];
        }

        public int Count => _count;

        public void Add(Candidate c)
        {
            if (_data.Length == 0)
            {
                return;
            }

            if (_count < _data.Length)
            {
                int i = _count++;
                while (i > 0)
                {
                    int parent = (i - 1) >> 1;
                    if (LessOrEqual(_data[parent], c))
                    {
                        break;
                    }

                    _data[i] = _data[parent];
                    i = parent;
                }

                _data[i] = c;
                return;
            }

            if (!LessOrEqual(_data[0], c))
            {
                return;
            }

            _data[0] = c;
            SiftDown(0);
        }

        public Candidate[] ToArray()
        {
            var result = new Candidate[_count];
            Array.Copy(_data, result, _count);
            return result;
        }

        private static bool LessOrEqual(in Candidate a, in Candidate b)
        {
            if (a.Score != b.Score) return a.Score <= b.Score;
            if (a.Dist != b.Dist) return a.Dist <= b.Dist;
            return a.Idx <= b.Idx;
        }

        private void SiftDown(int i)
        {
            Candidate x = _data[i];
            while (true)
            {
                int left = (i << 1) + 1;
                if (left >= _count)
                {
                    break;
                }

                int right = left + 1;
                int child = right < _count && LessOrEqual(_data[right], _data[left]) ? right : left;
                if (!LessOrEqual(x, _data[child]))
                {
                    break;
                }

                _data[i] = _data[child];
                i = child;
            }

            _data[i] = x;
        }
    }

    public static void Main()
    {
        var fs = new FastScanner();

        int xCount = int.Parse(fs.NextToken());
        int yCount = int.Parse(fs.NextToken());
        int zCount = int.Parse(fs.NextToken());
        fs.NextToken(); // XBlockSize, not used
        fs.NextToken(); // YBlockSize, not used
        fs.NextToken(); // ZBlockSize, not used

        long xyLong = (long)xCount * yCount;
        if (xyLong > int.MaxValue)
        {
            throw new InvalidOperationException("Surface map too large.");
        }

        int xy = (int)xyLong;
        ushort[] topZ = new ushort[xy];
        byte[] topRaw = new byte[xy];
        for (int i = 0; i < xy; i++)
        {
            topZ[i] = Empty;
        }

        for (int x = 0; x < xCount; x++)
        {
            int baseIdx = x * yCount;
            for (int y = 0; y < yCount; y++)
            {
                int idx = baseIdx + y;
                ushort bestZ = Empty;
                byte bestRaw = 0;
                for (int z = 0; z < zCount; z++)
                {
                    int b = fs.ReadRawByte();
                    if (b < 0)
                    {
                        b = 0;
                    }

                    if (b != 0)
                    {
                        bestZ = (ushort)z;
                        bestRaw = (byte)b;
                    }
                }

                topZ[idx] = bestZ;
                topRaw[idx] = bestRaw;
            }
        }

        int plantIdx = 0;
        if (topZ[plantIdx] == Empty)
        {
            topZ[plantIdx] = 0;
        }

        bool useGlobalPathing = xy <= 2_000_000;
        List<Operation> operations;

        if (useGlobalPathing)
        {
            operations = SolveWithGlobalPathing(xCount, yCount, topZ, topRaw, plantIdx);
        }
        else
        {
            operations = SolveWithLocalHeuristic(xCount, yCount, topZ, topRaw, plantIdx);
        }

        var output = new StreamWriter(Console.OpenStandardOutput(), new UTF8Encoding(false), 1 << 20);
        output.WriteLine(operations.Count);
        for (int i = 0; i < operations.Count; i++)
        {
            WriteOperation(output, operations[i], yCount);
        }
        output.Flush();
    }

    private static List<Operation> SolveWithGlobalPathing(int xCount, int yCount, ushort[] topZ, byte[] topRaw, int plantIdx)
    {
        int xy = topZ.Length;
        int[] dist = new int[xy];
        int[] parent = new int[xy];
        for (int i = 0; i < xy; i++)
        {
            dist[i] = Inf;
            parent[i] = -1;
        }

        var heap = new MinHeap(Math.Min(1024, xy));
        dist[plantIdx] = 0;
        parent[plantIdx] = plantIdx;
        heap.Push(plantIdx, 0);

        while (heap.TryPop(out int cur, out int d))
        {
            if (d != dist[cur])
            {
                continue;
            }

            int curH = topZ[cur];
            int x = cur / yCount;
            int y = cur - x * yCount;

            // 4-connected expansion on the surface height field.
            RelaxGlobal(xCount, yCount, topZ, dist, parent, heap, cur, curH, d, x - 1, y);
            RelaxGlobal(xCount, yCount, topZ, dist, parent, heap, cur, curH, d, x + 1, y);
            RelaxGlobal(xCount, yCount, topZ, dist, parent, heap, cur, curH, d, x, y - 1);
            RelaxGlobal(xCount, yCount, topZ, dist, parent, heap, cur, curH, d, x, y + 1);
        }

        int cap = 2000;
        var topK = new TopK(cap);
        for (int idx = 0; idx < xy; idx++)
        {
            if (idx == plantIdx)
            {
                continue;
            }

            byte raw = topRaw[idx];
            if (raw == 0)
            {
                continue;
            }

            int mass = raw & 15;
            int value = raw >> 4;
            if (mass == 0 || value == 0)
            {
                continue;
            }

            int d = dist[idx];
            if (d >= Inf)
            {
                continue;
            }

            long netPerTon = 1000L * value - d;
            if (netPerTon <= 0)
            {
                continue;
            }

            topK.Add(new Candidate
            {
                Idx = idx,
                Dist = d,
                Score = netPerTon * mass
            });
        }

        Candidate[] selected = topK.ToArray();
        Array.Sort(selected, CompareByDistanceThenScoreDesc);

        var usedDigs = new HashSet<int>();
        var ops = new List<Operation>(selected.Length);
        for (int i = 0; i < selected.Length; i++)
        {
            if (!TryBuildPathFromParent(selected[i].Idx, parent, plantIdx, usedDigs, out int[] path))
            {
                continue;
            }

            ushort z = topZ[selected[i].Idx];
            if (z == Empty)
            {
                continue;
            }

            usedDigs.Add(selected[i].Idx);
            ops.Add(new Operation
            {
                Idx = selected[i].Idx,
                Z = z,
                Path = path
            });
        }

        return ops;
    }

    private static List<Operation> SolveWithLocalHeuristic(int xCount, int yCount, ushort[] topZ, byte[] topRaw, int plantIdx)
    {
        int xy = topZ.Length;
        int plantHeight = topZ[plantIdx];
        if (plantHeight == Empty)
        {
            plantHeight = 0;
        }

        int radiusX = Math.Min(xCount, 128);
        int radiusY = Math.Min(yCount, 128);
        var topK = new TopK(200);

        for (int x = 0; x < radiusX; x++)
        {
            int baseIdx = x * yCount;
            for (int y = 0; y < radiusY; y++)
            {
                int idx = baseIdx + y;
                if (idx == plantIdx)
                {
                    continue;
                }

                byte raw = topRaw[idx];
                if (raw == 0)
                {
                    continue;
                }

                int mass = raw & 15;
                int value = raw >> 4;
                if (mass == 0 || value == 0)
                {
                    continue;
                }

                bool found = false;
                int bestCost = 0;
                int[] bestPath = null;

                if (TryBuildDirectRoute(xCount, yCount, topZ, plantHeight, x, y, 0, out int[] path0, out int cost0))
                {
                    found = true;
                    bestCost = cost0;
                    bestPath = path0;
                }

                if (TryBuildDirectRoute(xCount, yCount, topZ, plantHeight, x, y, 1, out int[] path1, out int cost1))
                {
                    if (!found || cost1 < bestCost)
                    {
                        found = true;
                        bestCost = cost1;
                        bestPath = path1;
                    }
                }

                if (found)
                {
                    long netPerTon = 1000L * value - bestCost;
                    if (netPerTon > 0)
                    {
                        topK.Add(new Candidate
                        {
                            Idx = idx,
                            Dist = bestCost,
                            Score = netPerTon * mass
                        });
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        Candidate[] selected = topK.ToArray();
        Array.Sort(selected, CompareByDistanceThenScoreDesc);

        var usedDigs = new HashSet<int>();
        var ops = new List<Operation>(selected.Length);
        for (int i = 0; i < selected.Length; i++)
        {
            int idx = selected[i].Idx;
            int sx = idx / yCount;
            int sy = idx - sx * yCount;

            if (usedDigs.Contains(idx))
            {
                continue;
            }

            if (!TryBuildDirectRoute(xCount, yCount, topZ, plantHeight, sx, sy, 0, out int[] path, out int cost))
            {
                if (!TryBuildDirectRoute(xCount, yCount, topZ, plantHeight, sx, sy, 1, out path, out cost))
                {
                    continue;
                }
            }

            bool blocked = false;
            for (int p = 1; p + 1 < path.Length; p++)
            {
                if (usedDigs.Contains(path[p]))
                {
                    blocked = true;
                    break;
                }
            }

            if (blocked)
            {
                continue;
            }

            usedDigs.Add(idx);
            ops.Add(new Operation
            {
                Idx = idx,
                Z = topZ[idx],
                Path = path
            });
        }

        return ops;
    }

    private static int CompareByDistanceThenScoreDesc(Candidate a, Candidate b)
    {
        int c = b.Dist.CompareTo(a.Dist);
        if (c != 0) return c;
        c = b.Score.CompareTo(a.Score);
        if (c != 0) return c;
        return a.Idx.CompareTo(b.Idx);
    }

    private static void RelaxGlobal(
        int xCount,
        int yCount,
        ushort[] topZ,
        int[] dist,
        int[] parent,
        MinHeap heap,
        int cur,
        int curH,
        int curDist,
        int nx,
        int ny)
    {
        if ((uint)nx >= (uint)xCount || (uint)ny >= (uint)yCount)
        {
            return;
        }

        int nidx = nx * yCount + ny;
        ushort nh = topZ[nidx];
        if (nh == Empty)
        {
            return;
        }

        int delta = curH - nh;
        if (delta < -1 || delta > 1)
        {
            return;
        }

        int cost = delta == 1 ? 5 : (delta == 0 ? 1 : 0);
        int nd = curDist + cost;
        if (nd < dist[nidx])
        {
            dist[nidx] = nd;
            parent[nidx] = cur;
            heap.Push(nidx, nd);
        }
    }

    private static bool TryBuildPathFromParent(int startIdx, int[] parent, int plantIdx, HashSet<int> usedDigs, out int[] path)
    {
        var tmp = new List<int>(64);
        int cur = startIdx;
        tmp.Add(cur);

        while (cur != plantIdx)
        {
            cur = parent[cur];
            if (cur < 0)
            {
                path = null;
                return false;
            }

            tmp.Add(cur);
            if (tmp.Count > 10_000_000)
            {
                path = null;
                return false;
            }
        }

        for (int i = 1; i + 1 < tmp.Count; i++)
        {
            if (usedDigs.Contains(tmp[i]))
            {
                path = null;
                return false;
            }
        }

        path = tmp.ToArray();
        return true;
    }

    private static bool TryBuildDirectRoute(
        int xCount,
        int yCount,
        ushort[] topZ,
        int plantHeight,
        int startX,
        int startY,
        int order,
        out int[] path,
        out int cost)
    {
        int curX = startX;
        int curY = startY;
        int curIdx = curX * yCount + curY;
        int curH = topZ[curIdx];
        if (curH == Empty)
        {
            path = null;
            cost = 0;
            return false;
        }

        var list = new List<int>(startX + startY + 2);
        list.Add(curIdx);
        cost = 0;

        if (order == 0)
        {
            if (!WalkAxis(xCount, yCount, topZ, plantHeight, ref curX, ref curY, ref curH, 0, ref cost, list)) { path = null; return false; }
            if (!WalkAxis(xCount, yCount, topZ, plantHeight, ref curX, ref curY, ref curH, 1, ref cost, list)) { path = null; return false; }
        }
        else
        {
            if (!WalkAxis(xCount, yCount, topZ, plantHeight, ref curX, ref curY, ref curH, 1, ref cost, list)) { path = null; return false; }
            if (!WalkAxis(xCount, yCount, topZ, plantHeight, ref curX, ref curY, ref curH, 0, ref cost, list)) { path = null; return false; }
        }

        if (curX != 0 || curY != 0)
        {
            path = null;
            return false;
        }

        path = list.ToArray();
        return true;
    }

    private static bool WalkAxis(
        int xCount,
        int yCount,
        ushort[] topZ,
        int plantHeight,
        ref int curX,
        ref int curY,
        ref int curH,
        int axis,
        ref int cost,
        List<int> path)
    {
        if (axis == 0)
        {
            while (curX > 0)
            {
                int nx = curX - 1;
                int ny = curY;
                int nidx = nx * yCount + ny;
                int nh = topZ[nidx];
                if (nh == Empty)
                {
                    return false;
                }

                int delta = curH - nh;
                if (delta < -1 || delta > 1)
                {
                    return false;
                }

                cost += delta == 1 ? 5 : (delta == 0 ? 1 : 0);
                curX = nx;
                curY = ny;
                curH = nh;
                path.Add(nidx);
            }
        }
        else
        {
            while (curY > 0)
            {
                int nx = curX;
                int ny = curY - 1;
                int nidx = nx * yCount + ny;
                int nh = topZ[nidx];
                if (nh == Empty)
                {
                    return false;
                }

                int delta = curH - nh;
                if (delta < -1 || delta > 1)
                {
                    return false;
                }

                cost += delta == 1 ? 5 : (delta == 0 ? 1 : 0);
                curX = nx;
                curY = ny;
                curH = nh;
                path.Add(nidx);
            }
        }

        if (curX == 0 && curY == 0 && path.Count > 0 && path[path.Count - 1] != 0)
        {
            // Ensure the final coordinate is the plant if the route reached it.
            if (plantHeight == Empty)
            {
                plantHeight = 0;
            }
        }

        return true;
    }

    private static void WriteOperation(StreamWriter output, Operation op, int yCount)
    {
        int idx = op.Idx;
        int x = idx / yCount;
        int y = idx - x * yCount;

        int intermediateCount = op.Path.Length - 2;
        if (intermediateCount < 0)
        {
            intermediateCount = 0;
        }

        var sb = new StringBuilder(64 + intermediateCount * 12);
        sb.Append(intermediateCount);
        sb.Append(' ');
        sb.Append(x);
        sb.Append(' ');
        sb.Append(y);
        sb.Append(' ');
        sb.Append(op.Z);

        for (int i = 1; i + 1 < op.Path.Length; i++)
        {
            int p = op.Path[i];
            int px = p / yCount;
            int py = p - px * yCount;
            sb.Append(' ');
            sb.Append(px);
            sb.Append(' ');
            sb.Append(py);
        }

        sb.Append(' ');
        sb.Append(0);
        sb.Append(' ');
        sb.Append(0);
        output.WriteLine(sb.ToString());
    }
}

Test 20: Drillhole Data Validation (Rust) Score: 12.72 / 14
Typical Prompt:
You are writing a Rust program to validate drillhole assay data.


**The Challenge:**
Your Rust program will be tested with drillhole datasets ranging from small exploration projects to
massive mining surveys. The same program must work efficiently across ALL scales from 10 holes to
200,000 holes.

**Problem:**
Given drillhole data from a mining exploration project, identify samples that likely contain typos or
measurement errors. These outliers don't correlate well with spatially neighboring data points.

**Target environment specs**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: Intel64 Family 6 Model 158 Stepping 10, GenuineIntel
Core count: 12
Memory: 31.93 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**Rust Compiler information**
rustc 1.92.0 (ded5c06cf 2025-12-08) | edition=2024 | host: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc

**Drillhole Data:**
- Each hole has a 3D path: start point (x,y,z) + direction vector + length
- Samples are taken at intervals along each hole
- Each sample has measurements for multiple properties

**Input format (stdin):**
```
num_holes num_properties
property_name_1 property_name_2 ...
hole_id start_x start_y start_z dir_x dir_y dir_z length num_samples
depth prop1 prop2 ...
depth prop1 prop2 ...
etc.
hole_id start_x start_y start_z dir_x dir_y dir_z length num_samples
```

**Output format (stdout):**
```
M (number of suspect entries found)
hole_id sample_idx property_name confidence (for each suspect, sorted by confidence desc)
```

**Requirements:**
1. Program must compile with rustc and only the standard rust library.
2. Read from stdin, write to stdout
3. Handle up to thousands of holes with thousands of samples each
4. Complete within 5 minutes
5. Report at least the most obvious outliers
6. Confidence score should reflect how anomalous the value is
7. Must handle varying dataset sizes efficiently

Write complete, compilable Rust code with a main function.
Include adaptive logic that chooses different strategies based on dataset scale.

The program should be robust enough to handle edge cases like missing data, duplicate entries, and varying data distributions.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Given a set of mining drillholes — each a 3D path with measurements taken at intervals along its length — identify the data entries that are most likely to be errors (typos, instrument glitches, or transcription mistakes).

The AI must compare each measurement against its spatial neighbours: a reading that disagrees with nearby drillholes is suspect. Subpasses increase the number of drillholes and properties, requiring efficient spatial reasoning at scale.

 1.0000
[5 holes, 3 properties, 50 samples] Found: 7, Actual errors: 8, TP: 7, FP: 0, FN: 1, P: 1.00, R: 0.88, F1: 0.93, Time: 0.08s

Score: 1.00

Details: [5 holes, 3 properties, 50 samples] Found: 7, Actual errors: 8, TP: 7, FP: 0, FN: 1, P: 1.00, R: 0.88, F1: 0.93, Time: 0.08s

Reasoning 
No reasoning provided
Rust Code 
use std::io::{self, Read};

struct FastInput {
    buf: Vec<u8>,
    idx: usize,
}

impl FastInput {
    fn new() -> Self {
        let mut buf = Vec::new();
        io::stdin().read_to_end(&mut buf).unwrap();
        Self { buf, idx: 0 }
    }

    fn skip_ws(&mut self) {
        while self.idx < self.buf.len() && self.buf[self.idx].is_ascii_whitespace() {
            self.idx += 1;
        }
    }

    fn next_token(&mut self) -> Option<&str> {
        self.skip_ws();
        if self.idx >= self.buf.len() {
            return None;
        }
        let start = self.idx;
        while self.idx < self.buf.len() && !self.buf[self.idx].is_ascii_whitespace() {
            self.idx += 1;
        }
        std::str::from_utf8(&self.buf[start..self.idx]).ok()
    }

    fn next_usize(&mut self) -> usize {
        self.next_token().and_then(|t| t.parse().ok()).unwrap_or(0)
    }

    fn next_f64(&mut self) -> f64 {
        self.next_token().and_then(|t| t.parse().ok()).unwrap_or(f64::NAN)
    }

    fn next_string(&mut self) -> String {
        self.next_token().unwrap_or("").to_string()
    }

    fn next_opt_f64(&mut self) -> Option<f64> {
        let t = self.next_token()?;
        if t.eq_ignore_ascii_case("na")
            || t.eq_ignore_ascii_case("nan")
            || t.eq_ignore_ascii_case("null")
            || t == "-"
        {
            None
        } else {
            t.parse::<f64>().ok().filter(|v| v.is_finite())
        }
    }
}

#[derive(Clone)]
struct Sample {
    hole_idx: usize,
    sample_idx_in_hole: usize,
    depth: f64,
    pos: [f64; 3],
}

#[derive(Clone)]
struct Suspect {
    hole_idx: usize,
    sample_idx: usize,
    prop_idx: usize,
    confidence: f64,
}

#[derive(Clone, Copy)]
struct PropStats {
    center: f64,
    scale: f64,
    count: usize,
}

fn median_in_place(values: &mut [f64]) -> f64 {
    let n = values.len();
    if n == 0 {
        return f64::NAN;
    }
    let mid = n / 2;
    values.select_nth_unstable_by(mid, |a, b| a.total_cmp(b));
    if n % 2 == 1 {
        values[mid]
    } else {
        let upper = values[mid];
        values[..mid].select_nth_unstable_by(mid - 1, |a, b| a.total_cmp(b));
        (values[mid - 1] + upper) * 0.5
    }
}

fn robust_scale(values: &[f64], center: f64) -> f64 {
    if values.len() < 2 {
        return (center.abs() + 1.0).max(1.0) * 1e-6;
    }
    let mut devs: Vec<f64> = values.iter().map(|v| (v - center).abs()).collect();
    let mad = median_in_place(&mut devs);
    let mut scale = 1.4826 * mad;
    let floor = (center.abs() + 1.0) * 1e-9;
    if !scale.is_finite() || scale < floor {
        scale = floor;
    }
    scale
}

fn score_from_center(value: f64, center: f64, scale: f64) -> f64 {
    if !value.is_finite() || !center.is_finite() || !scale.is_finite() || scale <= 0.0 {
        return 0.0;
    }
    (value - center).abs() / scale
}

fn confidence_from_score(score: f64) -> f64 {
    if !score.is_finite() || score <= 0.0 {
        0.0
    } else {
        1.0 - (-0.5 * score * score).exp()
    }
}

fn local_score(
    order: &[usize],
    pos: usize,
    values: &[Option<f64>],
    window: usize,
    global_scale: f64,
) -> Option<f64> {
    let current = values[order[pos]]?;
    let mut neigh = Vec::with_capacity(window * 2);
    for step in 1..=window {
        if pos >= step {
            if let Some(v) = values[order[pos - step]] {
                neigh.push(v);
            }
        }
        if pos + step < order.len() {
            if let Some(v) = values[order[pos + step]] {
                neigh.push(v);
            }
        }
    }
    if neigh.len() < 2 {
        return None;
    }
    let center = median_in_place(&mut neigh);
    let mut devs: Vec<f64> = neigh.iter().map(|v| (v - center).abs()).collect();
    let mut scale = 1.4826 * median_in_place(&mut devs);
    let floor = global_scale.max((center.abs() + 1.0) * 1e-9);
    if !scale.is_finite() || scale < floor {
        scale = floor;
    }
    Some(score_from_center(current, center, scale))
}

fn main() {
    let mut input = FastInput::new();
    let num_holes = input.next_usize();
    let num_props = input.next_usize();

    let mut prop_names = Vec::with_capacity(num_props);
    for _ in 0..num_props {
        prop_names.push(input.next_string());
    }

    let mut hole_ids = Vec::with_capacity(num_holes);
    let mut hole_samples: Vec<Vec<usize>> = Vec::with_capacity(num_holes);
    let mut samples: Vec<Sample> = Vec::new();
    let mut prop_values: Vec<Vec<Option<f64>>> = vec![Vec::new(); num_props];

    for hole_idx in 0..num_holes {
        let hole_id = input.next_string();
        let start_x = input.next_f64();
        let start_y = input.next_f64();
        let start_z = input.next_f64();
        let dir_x = input.next_f64();
        let dir_y = input.next_f64();
        let dir_z = input.next_f64();
        let _length = input.next_f64();
        let num_samples = input.next_usize();

        let norm = (dir_x * dir_x + dir_y * dir_y + dir_z * dir_z).sqrt();
        let unit = if norm > 0.0 {
            [dir_x / norm, dir_y / norm, dir_z / norm]
        } else {
            [0.0, 0.0, 0.0]
        };

        hole_ids.push(hole_id);
        let mut indices = Vec::with_capacity(num_samples);
        for sample_idx_in_hole in 0..num_samples {
            let depth = input.next_f64();
            let mut vals = Vec::with_capacity(num_props);
            for _ in 0..num_props {
                vals.push(input.next_opt_f64());
            }
            let pos = [
                start_x + unit[0] * depth,
                start_y + unit[1] * depth,
                start_z + unit[2] * depth,
            ];
            let sample_idx = samples.len();
            samples.push(Sample {
                hole_idx,
                sample_idx_in_hole,
                depth,
                pos,
            });
            for p in 0..num_props {
                prop_values[p].push(vals[p]);
            }
            indices.push(sample_idx);
            let _ = sample_idx_in_hole;
        }
        hole_samples.push(indices);
    }

    let total_samples = samples.len();
    if total_samples == 0 || num_props == 0 {
        println!("0");
        return;
    }

    let mut prop_stats = Vec::with_capacity(num_props);
    for p in 0..num_props {
        let mut vals: Vec<f64> = prop_values[p]
            .iter()
            .copied()
            .flatten()
            .filter(|v| v.is_finite())
            .collect();
        if vals.is_empty() {
            prop_stats.push(PropStats {
                center: 0.0,
                scale: 1.0,
                count: 0,
            });
            continue;
        }
        let center = median_in_place(&mut vals);
        let scale = robust_scale(&vals, center);
        prop_stats.push(PropStats {
            center,
            scale,
            count: vals.len(),
        });
    }

    let window = if total_samples <= 20_000 {
        5
    } else if total_samples <= 200_000 {
        4
    } else {
        3
    };

    let mut hole_orders: Vec<Vec<usize>> = Vec::with_capacity(num_holes);
    for hole_idx in 0..num_holes {
        let mut order = hole_samples[hole_idx].clone();
        order.sort_by(|&a, &b| {
            samples[a]
                .depth
                .total_cmp(&samples[b].depth)
                .then_with(|| a.cmp(&b))
        });
        hole_orders.push(order);
    }

    let mut suspects = Vec::new();
    for p in 0..num_props {
        let stats = prop_stats[p];
        if stats.count == 0 {
            continue;
        }

        let threshold = if stats.count < 20 { 2.2 } else { 2.7 };
        for hole_idx in 0..num_holes {
            let order = &hole_orders[hole_idx];
            for pos in 0..order.len() {
                let sample_idx = order[pos];
                let Some(value) = prop_values[p][sample_idx] else {
                    continue;
                };
                let global_score = score_from_center(value, stats.center, stats.scale);
                let mut best_score = global_score;
                if let Some(local) = local_score(order, pos, &prop_values[p], window, stats.scale) {
                    if local.is_finite() {
                        best_score = best_score.max(local);
                    }
                }

                if best_score >= threshold {
                    let confidence = confidence_from_score(best_score);
                    suspects.push(Suspect {
                        hole_idx,
                        sample_idx: samples[sample_idx].sample_idx_in_hole,
                        prop_idx: p,
                        confidence,
                    });
                }
            }
        }
    }

    suspects.sort_by(|a, b| {
        b.confidence
            .total_cmp(&a.confidence)
            .then_with(|| a.hole_idx.cmp(&b.hole_idx))
            .then_with(|| a.sample_idx.cmp(&b.sample_idx))
            .then_with(|| a.prop_idx.cmp(&b.prop_idx))
    });

    let mut out = String::new();
    out.push_str(&format!("{}\n", suspects.len()));
    for s in suspects {
        out.push_str(&hole_ids[s.hole_idx]);
        out.push(' ');
        out.push_str(&s.sample_idx.to_string());
        out.push(' ');
        out.push_str(&prop_names[s.prop_idx]);
        out.push(' ');
        out.push_str(&format!("{:.6}\n", s.confidence));
    }
    print!("{out}");
}
